reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y buenos precios seas o no seas socio. Esta bien ubicada y cuenta con los mejores servicios. Siempre te atienden con la mejor buena onda y rápido. En temporada puede que se junte mucha gente y toque hacer fila pero es igual en todos lados

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and good prices, whether you're a member or not. It's well located and has the best services. They always serve you promptly and with the best of humor. During peak season, it can get crowded and you may have to wait in line, but it's the same everywhere.
